title: 10 best herbal creams for back pain
description: Cannabis sativa, also known as marijuana, creams helps with back pain because of its unique combination of compounds, including cannabinoids and terpenes. These natural agents work synergistically to reduce inflammation and relax tense muscles, providing relief from chronic back pain. The topical application of Cannabis sativa creams allows the active ingredients to directly target the affected area, promoting localized relief and reducing the need for systemic medication.
